race.comment: CHAINS OF LOVE (4) nice filly expected to go quickly through the grades this time in. Thrown in the deep end second-up from the wide gate with a tough on-pace sixth over 1200m in the LR Queensland Day Stakes at Eagle Farm. Has the speed to get over from the poor draw and take holding out. EXIT FEE (1) at his top for this and will relish the extra 100m today. Given every chance in the straight with the 61kg when he failed to pick up SHE WITHIN over 1100m at this track. Doesn't have to improve much to take this out. OCCULT (6) sharp drop in trip last start and failed to get cover with a tiring thirteenth over 1100m at this track. McEvoy sticks and can race closer from the better gate. SHE WITHIN (7) saved a ton of ground along the inside with a dominant victory from back in the field over 1100m at this track in Highway class. Even better placed out to the 1200m. Can overcome the extra weight and win again. MARTINI MUMMA (11) underrated mare who can sprint well fresh with the claim.
